Privacy & Cloaking

Control your privacy and how DDX appears to others

URL Cloak

Auto

Disguise the page URL. Enable auto to cloak on every page load.

Tab Cloaking

Change your tab's title and favicon to disguise your browsing

Preview

Anti-Tab Close

Prevent tabs from closing accidentally with beforeunload warning

Set a keybind to quickly redirect to a safe page

Backend

Search Engine

Search Suggestions

Show search suggestions as you type in the address bar

WISP Server

Select a WISP proxy server. Premium servers (Night+ only) offer better performance and reliability.

Night+ Premium Servers Available

Upgrade to Night+ to access high-performance premium WISP servers with better speed and reliability.

Enable Reflux

Enhanced proxy plugin system for additional features

Keyboard Shortcuts

Customize keyboard shortcuts for various actions

Advanced

Developer tools and advanced configuration options

Remote Proxy Server

Route traffic through an external proxy server (supports SOCKS5, SOCKS4 & HTTP - only works with LibCurl transport). Mullvad servers require Night+ VPN to function properly.

Developer Tools

Choose which developer tools to use when pressing F12 or Ctrl+Shift+I

About DayDreamX

Information about the project and contributors

DayDream X

A web-based browser experience

Version
2.2.0
Stack
Nightmare + TailwindCSS + Typescript
Made by
Night Network

Frequently Asked Questions

Common questions and answers about DayDreamX

Where can I find links?

You can find links in our Discord server. Join the community and check the pinned messages or links channel for the latest available links. discord.gg/algebra

Why do some sites not load or work?

There are several common reasons why a site might not work:

  • The site may have strict anti-proxy or bot detection measures
  • The site uses WebSocket connections that may be blocked by your network
  • Some sites require features that web proxies cannot fully replicate
  • Your network or school may be blocking the proxy transport layer
  • The hosted link may be having issues — try a different one

How can I make links? (BYOD)

You can create your own link using a free DNS service. Here's how:

  1. Go to FreeDNS and create an account
  2. Navigate to "Subdomains" and click "Add a subdomain"
  3. Choose any subdomain name and pick a domain from the list
  4. Set the type to A and enter the IP address: 51.222.206.184
  5. Save the record and wait a few minutes for DNS propagation
  6. Visit your new subdomain — it should load DayDreamX

I found a bug, what now?

We appreciate bug reports! Here's how you can let us know:

  • Open an issue on our GitLab repository with steps to reproduce the bug
  • Report it in the bug reports channel on our Discord server
  • Include details like what you were doing, what you expected, and what happened instead
